heygen_script:
Welcome to Sue's Sewing & Laundry, your premier destination for One-stop: alterations, sewing, boot repair, dry cleaning.

What sets us apart: Since 1998, military discounts, 24-hour turnaround

Visit us today and experience the quality that has made us a local favorite.

Sue's Sewing & Laundry - Quality Service, Every Time.
